{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Paths
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Arelius family]] collects secrets about the [[Paths]] of their rivals.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
